leadText: The Sachet (Japanese: においぶくろ Sachet) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VI. It allows Spritzee to evolve into Aromatisse.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] Causes Spritzee to evolve into Aromatisse when traded while holding it. This consumes the Sachet.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods X Y Route 12 , Cyllage City Y Battle Maison (32 BP ) OR AS Battle Maison (32 BP ) PMC * Balloon Popping (Lv. 2) S M US UM Konikoni City Battle Tree (32 BP ) Sw Sh Hammerlocke (10 BP ) Battle Café Sw Sh IA Cram-o-matic ( Fairy : 52-60 points) ZA Reward for completing Side Mission 10: "Skiddo's Fragrant Leaves" Infinite Z-A Royale Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period Sw Sh The Isle of Armor promotion packs All June 5 to 11, 2020 Pokémon Center Alcremie Sweets Japan November 1, 2021 to October 31, 2022

sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A sachet filled with fragrant perfumes that are just slightly too overwhelming. Yet it's loved by a certain Pokémon. S V ZA A sachet filled with fragrant perfumes that are just slightly overwhelming. Yet it's loved by a certain Pokémon.
